headline: Realty Income Announces 671st Consecutive Common Stock Monthly Dividend
summary: Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced that it has declared its 671st consecutive common stock monthly dividend. The dividend amount of $0.2705 per share, representing an annualized amount of $3.246 per share, is payable on June 15, 2026 to stockholders of record as of May 29, 2026.

headline: Building A $100,000 Snowball To Retire On Dividends
